horizon_days.description: Predict whether the target event occurs within this many days.

inference_population.description: Population filter for daily scoring. Defaults to training_population if not provided.

prediction_mode.description:
'adoption': predict first-time occurrence for users who haven't done it yet. 'continuation': predict repeat occurrence for users who have already done it.

* `adoption` - adoption
* `continuation` - continuation

target_event.description: Event name to predict, e.g. '$pageview'. Must exist in the team's event schema.

training_population.description: Population filter for training examples. Use {} for all identified users.
